zh.Of, Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓
zh.Osbaldeston, Blackburn, Lancashire, Engl: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓
zh.Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldeston是Hugo de Osbaldeston II的兒子，於1149年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓。他與Wimara結婚。他們至少是9個兒子的父母。他去世於1202年在英國享年53歲。

zh-hans.Of, Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓

zh-hans.Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldeston是Hugo de Osbaldeston II的儿子，于1149年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓。他与Wimara结婚。他们至少是9个儿子的父母。他去世于1202年在英国享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Osbaldeston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Osbaldeston (Lancs), which is recorded as Osbaldeston in 1246 and Osbaldiston in 1258. The place-name derives from the Old English personal name Osbald + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

variants.name: Albiston
meanings: English: (i) variant of Albinson , altered (with intrusive t) as if derived from a place-name. Compare Alliston . (ii) possibly a variant of Osbaldeston , from Osbaldeston (Lancs), which has a local pronunciation [ˈɔːbɪstn].

en.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldeston was born in 1149, in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Hugo de Osbaldeston II. He married Wimara. They were the parents of at least 9 sons. He died in 1202, in England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldeston est né en 1149, à Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Hugo de Osbaldeston II. Il a épousé Wimara. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils. Il est décédé en 1202, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldeston wurde 1149 in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Hugo de Osbaldeston II geboren. Er hat Wimara geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne. Er starb 1202 im Alter von 53 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldeston è nato il nel 1149 nel Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Hugo de Osbaldeston II. Lui sposato Wimara. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli. Morì nel 1202, nel England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Osbaldeston, Blackburn, Lancashire, Engl: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオスバルデストン
ja.Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアオスバルデストン
ja.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldestonは1149年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオスバルデストンでHugo de Osbaldeston IIの息子として生まれた。Wimaraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子の親であった。彼は1202年にイギリスで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldeston(은)는 1149년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 오스볼데스턴에서 Hugo de Osbaldeston II의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Wimara(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1202년 영국에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Of, Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England: Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Osbaldeston, Blackburn, Lancashire, Engl: Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldeston nasceu em 1149, em Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Hugo de Osbaldeston II. Ele casou-se com Wimara. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1202, em Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldeston родился в 1149 г. в местности осбалдестон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Hugo de Osbaldeston II. Он женился на женщине по имени Wimara. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей. Он умер в 1202 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Ailsius de Osbaldeston nació en 1149, en Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Hugo de Osbaldeston II. Se casó con Wimara. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos. Murió en 1202, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
